calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ngoc Trieu and Anh Phan in propria persona.

Mr. Trieu stated that they registered their marriage at the consulate general in Vietnam and that they followed Vietnamese law. Mrs. Phan stated that they had a ceremony in December 2016 in Vietnam, and they then came here to the Vietnamese consulate. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.
